new_classes.label_en: semi-sparkling wine of fresh grapes with PDO in containers ≤ 2 L (CN 2204 22 10–38)
new_classes.label_de: Perlwein mit geschützter Ursprungsbezeichnung (g.U.) in Behältnissen bis 2 L (KN 2204 22 10–38)
new_classes.definition_en: Semi-sparkling wine of fresh grapes bearing a protected designation of origin (PDO) as defined in Additional Note 6(a) to Chapter 22, presented in containers of a nominal volume not exceeding 2 litres.

new_classes.label_en: still wine of fresh grapes with PDO in containers > 2 L (CN 2204 29 xx)
new_classes.label_de: Stillwein aus frischen Weintrauben mit g.U. in Behältnissen über 2 L (KN 2204 29 xx)
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes bearing a protected designation of origin (PDO) as defined in Additional Note 6(a) to Chapter 22, presented in containers of a nominal volume exceeding 2 litres.

new_classes.label_en: semi-sparkling wine of fresh grapes with PDO, actual alcoholic strength > 15% vol, in containers ≤ 2 L (CN 2204 22 26)
new_classes.label_de: Perlwein aus frischen Weintrauben mit g.U., vorhandener Alkoholgehalt > 15 % vol, in Behältnissen bis 2 L (KN 2204 22 26)
new_classes.definition_en: Semi-sparkling wine of fresh grapes bearing a protected designation of origin (PDO) as defined in Additional Note 6(a) to Chapter 22, with an actual alcoholic strength by volume exceeding 15% vol, presented in containers of a nominal volume not exceeding 2 litres (CN 2204 22 26).

coverage_explanation: The legal text references CN codes 22042222–22042278 as covering wines with protected designation of origin (PDO), defined by Additional Note 6(a) to Chapter 22. For CN 22042226 specifically, the distinguishing criteria are: (1) wine of fresh grapes – captured by inheritance from SemiSparklingWine → WineOfFreshGrapes; (2) semi-sparkling character (pétillant/frizzante) – captured by parent class SemiSparklingWine; (3) PDO quality – captured via ProtectedDesignationOfOriginQuality restriction; (4) container volume ≤ 2 L – captured via SmallContainer part restriction; (5) actual alcoholic strength > 15% vol – captured via decimalRange restriction on alcoholicStrengthByVolumePercent. The content of Additional Note 6(a) itself (the detailed definition of PDO for wine purposes) is not directly axiomatised here as it is a legal cross-reference rather than a product property; this slightly reduces coverage. The intermediate class SemiSparklingWineWithPDO2204Small and the auxiliary StillWineWithPDO2204Large are introduced to support sibling discrimination within the 2204 22 range.
